ItacAcademyItem.Name: Animosi-Venezia (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Ivy twined round a bay tree
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The Academy was created in Palazzo Morosini, after the Dodonei ceased their activity. Some pre-1700 publications not included in British Library catalogue, are: Il giudicio di Paride su`l monte Ida, intermezzo per musica da cantarsi nell`Accademia de` Signori Animosi di Venezia adi 31 gennaro l`anno 1699 in casa di S.E. il signor Gio: Carlo Grimani:1699; L` accademia sagro-politica. Raunata dal p. maestro, e reggente di Padova il p.f. Gio. Maria Muti domenicano. E dedicata all`illustrissimo, & eccellentissimo signor Gio. Carlo Grimani, In Milano, 1695, which apparently contains discourses read before the Animosi Academy in Venice (according to Maylender, Storia delle Accademie..., I, p. 207).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
